## What does this PR do?
<!-- A short summary. Link any related issue, e.g. "Closes #12". -->

## Type of change
- [ ] ➕ Add a resource to the awesome list
- [ ] 🛠️ Add / update a quick-win project
- [ ] 🔌 Add / update a hardware or runtime page
- [ ] 🔁 Fix a rename / deprecation / outdated spec
- [ ] 🔗 Fix broken link(s)
- [ ] ✍️ Improve an explanation / fix a typo

## Checklist
- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) and my change meets the quality bar
- [ ] Links go to the specific page/repo and have **no trailing slash**
- [ ] New resources use the format: `- [Name](url) - Short description.`
- [ ] Any spec/figure I added is sourced (and dated if it changes often)
- [ ] I ran `npx awesome-lint awesome-resources/README.md` if I touched the list
- [ ] Internal relative links resolve (the link-check workflow will verify)
